comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Plan-review: PASS (signed). Triage of 11 advisories -> implementation decisions: (a) G6/T8/E4/T1: the veto must NOT be a det_floor PRE-LLM check (runs before G5 findings exist). Correct seam = post-Pass-1 filter in run_pass1 where the LLM finding + store child-count are co-observable. Pure veto fn lives in det_floor.py (ticket's named file, co-located w/ decomposition logic p4_oversize) with a docstring stating it is applied post-Pass-1, deliberately NOT a DET_CHECKS entry; keep the veto as the DETERMINISTIC backstop (AC1 injection reduces but does not eliminate model FP). (b) T8/G1G2/T8: real prompt assembly is passes.pass1_chunk/_criterion_block -> add extra_context param threaded via sizing.pass1_with_ladder, populated from ctx.children ONLY for the chunk containing G5. child status field: c.get('status') or c.get('state',{}).get('status','?'). (c) E5/E6/COH/E1: dedicated tests/unit/test_g5_decomp_det.py with with-children-veto, childless-passthrough, with-children-but-genuine-altitude-still-fires, + assert finder prompt contains 'DECOMPOSITION STATE (from store):'. (d) E3: grep-verify no downstream consumer keys on G5 findings post-floor.

Plan-review PASS+signed; pre-commit lint+full-mypy PASSED; tests/unit/test_g5_decomp_det.py (13) + 145 existing plan-review/kernel tests green. NOT CLOSED: close is deferred until this change's Gerrit Verified vote is +1 (CLAUDE.local.md CI-before-close rule). Next: push stack to gerrit, then transition in_progress->closed (runs completion-verifier) after Verified.

compiled_state.description:
## What
G5 (decomposition) currently judges from ticket TEXT and false-flagged an epic that already had 6
children as a "flat, undecomposed list". The store already loads the real children — `ctx.children`
is populated by the N+1 read in `orchestrator.py:166-182` and counted in `pass1.py:427`. Make that
fact authoritative for G5 so the model never counts children itself.

## Scope / files
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/pass1.py` — inject an authoritative `DECOMPOSITION STATE (from store):
  N direct children: [alias - title (status)]` block into the G5 finder context from `ctx.children`.
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py` (or the DET-invariant seam) — add a deterministic veto that
  drops any G5 "flat/undecomposed" finding when `len(ctx.children) > 0`.
- `tests/unit/` — regression test for the previously-misfired case.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The G5 finder context includes the store-sourced authoritative child summary.
- [ ] A DET guard suppresses a G5 decomposition finding when the ticket has >=1 child (count from the
      store, not the model); G5 still judges child-content/altitude.
- [ ] Regression test: an epic with children no longer yields a G5 "undecomposed" finding; a genuinely
      monolithic childless ticket still does.
compiled_state.title: Deterministic G5 decomposition signal (store-derived child count feeds the finder + DET veto)
